title: rubus argyriophyllus
intro: Rubus argyriophyllus, also known as Himalayan raspberry or Arunii, is a species of raspberry native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus argyriophyllus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant include tea, decoctions, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues.
